race.comment: FRAM STRAIT (4) was one of the best things beaten you're ever likely to see last start. Held up for most of the race and still beaten less than two lengths. Needless to say he should have won, which was his first start as a gelding, and he had trialled well previously to suggest an improved performance was on the cards. Have to forgive that performance and while the wide gate looks ugly on paper it at least should ensure there's no repeat of last start. SASSIDORA (12) has been around the mark in most starts and been beaten less than half-a-length her past two, so it's hard to envisage her not playing a key role again from the gun draw. SO YOU EXCEL (13) has had both runs back this time in handy Sale maidens and was a big improver second-up, so from a good draw she looks a major player. DEEPSEEK (3) wasn't beaten far when in the market on debut, so deserves another chance. DOUBT IT'S LOVE (11) will find this easier than some of the prior starts and draws gate 1.
